    <item>
      <title>Did Luka Doncic commit a strategic technical foul?</title>
      <description>Luka Doncic spent weeks on the verge of a one-game suspension after receiving his 15th technical foul of the season. He finally drew that suspension for the Los Angeles Lakers' easiest remaining game, against the lowly Washington Wizards.</description>
